acceptance_targets: [chapter_02_prose_01] Pass if the revised chapter uses 'There it was' no more than once across the beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:45, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:145, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:217, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:411, and if the replacement text for snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:119, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:237, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:409, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:429, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:479 does not reuse more than two second-based variants to mark emotional turns. Fail if those formulas still serve as the default signal for recognition or tonal shift.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised chapter uses 'There it was' no more than once across the beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:45, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:145, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:217, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:411, and if the replacement text for snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:119, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:237, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:409, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:429, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:479 does not reuse more than two second-based variants to mark emotional turns. Fail if those formulas still serve as the default signal for recognition or tonal shift.
findings.evidence: Recurring formulas exceed the allowed threshold: 'There it was' appears at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:45, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:145, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:217, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:411, while second-based beat markers recur at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:119, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:237, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:409, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:429, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:479.
findings.problem: The prose falls into repeatable reveal and time-slice templates often enough to feel automated. Those hinge phrases flatten otherwise strong material because recognition beats start arriving in the same sentence shape instead of through character-specific perception, action, or image.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:45, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:145, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:217, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:411, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:119, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:237, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:409, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:429, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:479 so the turns land through distinct sensory or behavioral detail rather than stock hinge wording. Keep at most one 'There it was' in the chapter and vary the time-unit beats instead of repeatedly reaching for 'for a second' variants.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the ugly overlap between office systems and intimate life: sweat under formalwear, sponsored groceries in the middle of a fight, sex that clarifies nothing, a child noticing coercion through object logic. When choosing between elegant abstraction and embarrassing specificity, choose specificity unless the character is actively lying to themselves. If a scene risks becoming pure farce, restore weight through money, care work, or the body's limits; if it risks becoming solemn prestige fiction, let the absurd machinery stay absurd.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a draft replaces bodily fact, financial shame, sexual consequence, or emotional cruelty with tasteful summary, rewrite until the cost is present in scene rather than merely reported.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, ritual formality, or character-specific self-control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: No two consecutive chapters should move the same way. Follow spectacle with aftermath, ritual with drift, humiliation with quiet, revelation with preparation. Vary scene count, dialogue density, location spread, and whether the chapter advances by confrontation, seduction, dread, comic escalation, or changed understanding.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary English with room for corporate and systems language when characters would actually think or speak that way; every abstract term should be contaminated by bodily or household reality nearby.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third that stays inside the current focalizer's sensory field and only shifts focalization at scene breaks.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate dry compression for comic pressure with longer, accrual-based sentences when shame, fatigue, or desire flood the body. Let jokes land through timing and juxtaposition rather than narrator commentary.
